arms_mandatory_baselines: deranged-probe instrument (the judge-level content-scramble control, house shuffled-kernel idiom: own-gloss deranged out via seed-pinned Sattolo cycle => correct answer NONE by construction; measures false-endorsement propensity = the channel that would fabricate a proxy-PASS under H-CIRC)
judge-2 (GPT-5.5) diagnostic arm (single-family replicate: raw agreement gates stability in its FAIL direction only; A_j2 and the concordant-panel analog reported-only)

kernel-as-text null and host-model arms: NOT APPLICABLE by design -- this record has NO host model and NO GPU cell; it measures judge endorsement of kernel content, not model lift (Law-2 obligations live in f2b-transfer stage 2, unchanged)

dependent_vars.definition: A_1p = n_agree_j1p / n_labelled_j1p: share of judge-1p-labelled d-qa-t items whose judge-1p label equals membership gold; escapes count as disagreement; no-label items leave the denominator (capped by gate). THE proxy endorsement statistic; estimand is GPT-5.x-family endorsement, NOT human-anchored external gold (envelope clause 1)
dependent_vars.name: external_endorsement_proxy

dependent_vars.definition: share of items labelled by BOTH judges where the tokens are byte-equal (escape is a category). CORRELATION DIAGNOSTIC + stability gate: < 0.80 invalidates; >= 0.80 validates NOTHING (single model family)
dependent_vars.name: judge_pair_agreement_raw

dependent_vars.definition: share of labelled deranged-probe items answered A/B/C/D (any option endorsed where NONE is correct by construction); point >= 0.30 invalidates the judge instrument (style-endorsement channel)
dependent_vars.name: probe_false_endorse_rate

dependent_vars.definition: judge-2's own agreement with membership gold (reported-only diagnostic; contextualises A_1p within the model family)
dependent_vars.name: a_j2

dependent_vars.definition: the f2b-transfer-formula analog on concordant pairs only (discordant = unresolved-proxy; NO judge-3 here). Reported-only, for FORM comparability with the eventual human-judged stage-1; carries no validation weight (correlated panel)
dependent_vars.name: a_panel_concordant

levels: judge-1p (GPT-5.6-Sol, SOLE gold source; LLM stand-in for the judge-1 role)
judge-2 (GPT-5.5, DIAGNOSTIC + stability gate only; raw responses reused read-only from the in-flight f2b-transfer instrument run -- never re-run, never gold)
independent_vars.name: judge_role

levels: d-qa-t blind items (360; byte-identical to f2b-transfer's, judge-1 role pinned shuffle dadjt/1|judge-1|20260710)
deranged-probe (60; instrument control, seed-pinned Sattolo derangement of own-gloss texts; never in labels or A_1p)
independent_vars.name: item_set

n_planned.adjudication: judge-1p (GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low, temperature-0 operationalisation disclosed in the pinned invocation spec section 4) labels all 360 blind d-qa-t items in the judge-1 role's pinned shuffle order dadjt/1|judge-1|20260710, then the 60 probe items in dadjt/1|judge-1p-probe|20260711 order; per-item stateless hardened codex calls (empty out-of-repo workdir, user config ignored, memories + web search disabled, read-only sandbox, server-side output-schema enum, zero-tool-use tripwire, first-valid-answer-final, <= 3 content attempts, no-label after that -- never mapped to the escape); preflight on the 2 pinned calibration items must pass first-attempt before any real item. NO judge-3 (the maintainer tie-break instrument is deliberately left uncontaminated for the human f2b-transfer round); discordant judge-1p/judge-2 pairs stay unresolved-proxy and are diagnostic only

assumptions.claim: stand-in rationale: the frozen f2b-transfer section-4 protocol requires judge-1 to be a kernel-naive HUMAN; that human is unavailable at run time and the maintainer requested a fast LLM stand-in feasibility read (2026-07-09). This record is the SEPARATE, clearly-labelled stand-in: a FRESH id, not a correction of f2b-transfer -- judge identity is load-bearing design scope (a different estimand), adjudication data for f2b-transfer already exists (judge-2 in flight), so the corrections/1 pre-data reset-refreeze test fails, and re-freezing would consume f2b-transfer's single adjudication round on the weaker design while exiling the definitive human run to a new id -- exactly backwards

GPT-5.6 availability (designer capability check, 2026-07-09): the global codex-cli 0.142.5 rejects -m gpt-5.6 (HTTP 400, no catalog entry); under npx-pinned @openai/codex 0.144.1 the catalog lists gpt-5.6-sol (efforts low..ultra, default low) and the exact pinned invocation succeeded end-to-end (exit 0, schema-constrained answer, zero tool events). The global codex MUST NOT be upgraded until the in-flight judge-2 run (pinned to 0.142.5) completes

decision value of the proxy: an LLM's blind endorsement is treated as a feasibility input for programme sequencing (continue investment / pause) only, never as evidence toward H-TRANSFER; registered as ASM-0022

familiarity-channel direction: NSM literature in GPT-5.x training data plausibly biases the judge TOWARD endorsing NSM-style explications; direction and size unproven; registered as ASM-0021, load_bearing false, resolved by comparing the eventual human-judged f2b-transfer stage-1 A against A_1p on the same items

judge-2 reuse: the GPT-5.5 judge-2 raw responses are produced ONCE by the in-flight f2b-transfer instrument run (same 360 blind item bytes, same rendering contract) and are read here as a pinned read-only diagnostic input; no second GPT-5.5 adjudication round is run; f2b-transfer's own single adjudication round is NOT consumed by this record

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance -- NOT general coverage; every statement about 'the kernel's content' is bounded to the 108 covered concepts of d-qa-t

nothing here amends f2b-transfer: its frozen record, prereg doc, d-adj-t placeholder, single-draw rule, and human judge-1 path stand exactly as frozen; this record neither fills f2b-transfer's d-adj-t pin nor appends to its log

n_planned.endorsement_gate: KILL analog, the only hypothesis gate: FAIL iff one-sided 95% Wilson LB of A_1p < 0.70 (powered: at expected 0.85, n=360 fully labelled, Wilson LB ~ 0.816 > 0.70; still decidable at the n_labelled floor of 300: LB ~ 0.813)
n_planned.instrument_gates: adjudication_valid: preflight_pass AND n_labelled_j1p >= 300 AND n_nolabel_j1p <= 18 AND raw judge-1p/judge-2 agreement >= 0.80. probe_valid: n_probe_labelled >= 54 AND probe false-endorsement point-rate < 0.30. Failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS
n_planned.stage_discipline: freeze BEFORE any judge-1p call; the in-flight f2b-transfer judge-2 run completes under ITS OWN spec and pins first (its outputs are read-only input here); then preflight -> 360 real items -> 60 probes -> assemble data/d-adj-t-llmproxy -> corpus-pin -> ops amendment fills the placeholder pins -> log-append the single stage-1 final-phase record -> verdict-gen -> cross-vendor audit (family overlap with the judges DISCLOSED: the audit is mechanical recomputation from pinned bytes and does not validate judge quality) -> Fable interpretive assessment

scale_rungs: none (stage-1 adjudication only; no host model; no GPU)

endpoints.test: STAGE-1 endorsement statistic from judge-1p's labels ALONE: A_1p with one-sided 95% Wilson lower bound; FAIL (kill analog) iff LB < 0.70; PASS otherwise -- and the extrapolation envelope caps ANY PASS at 'weak feasibility proxy' (clause 4). No bootstrap, no seeds: a deterministic count over 360 pinned items

INSTRUMENT gate (never a hypothesis test): preflight_pass AND n_labelled_j1p >= 300 AND n_nolabel_j1p <= 18 AND raw judge-1p/judge-2 agreement >= 0.80 (stability only; the pass direction of a single-family agreement validates nothing); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

INSTRUMENT gate, point rule (house kill-(b) style): deranged-probe false-endorsement rate >= 0.30 OR n_probe_labelled < 54 => INSTRUMENT-INVALID; the probe is the judge-level content-scramble control and the escape-function check

REPORTED-ONLY correlation diagnostic (also consumed by the adjudication gate in its FAIL direction): raw token agreement of the two GPT-5.x judges; expected HIGH under family correlation -- high agreement is NOT validation
REPORTED-ONLY: judge-2's own membership agreement (family context for A_1p)

REPORTED-ONLY: concordant-pair panel analog of the f2b-transfer A formula (discordant pairs unresolved-proxy; no judge-3), for FORM comparability with the eventual human-judged stage-1; carries no validation weight

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE ADJUDICATING EXPERIMENT: the judge-1 role is filled by a pinned LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol via codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low, pinned invocation data/d-adj-t-llmproxy/judge-1p-invocation.md) because the kernel-naive HUMAN judge-1 that the frozen f2b-transfer section-4 protocol requires is unavailable at run time; f2b-transfer (frozen_sha256 b341a0901e12023d3c56bdc196be0b9c492c7d348f988416d7e9c43aade20879) remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and is the ONLY experiment on this line whose Stage-1 adjudicates H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC. External gold here IS one LLM's endorsement under blind rendering -- NOT blind human concept competence. Binding weakenings: (1) SINGLE JUDGE FAMILY -- judge-1p (GPT-5.6) and the diagnostic judge-2 (GPT-5.5) are same-vendor, adjacent-generation models and may correlate through shared training data, shared preference tuning, and shared style priors; they are NOT a two-judge panel in the section-4 sense; their raw agreement is reported as a CORRELATION DIAGNOSTIC and is NEVER evidence of independent validation; A_1p estimates 'GPT-5.x-family endorsement of the kernel's content', an estimand that family-level bias can inflate or deflate independent of real kernel content. (2) KERNEL-TRADITION FAMILIARITY -- the judge is kernel-INSTANCE-naive by context control (E5: empty out-of-repo workdir, user config ignored, memories and web search disabled) but NOT kernel-tradition-naive: NSM literature and NSM-style explications are plausibly in GPT-5.x training data (ASM-0021), so the judge may endorse a familiar explication STYLE rather than judge content from concept competence -- a channel that inflates A_1p under BOTH hypotheses; the deranged-probe gate bounds only its crudest form. (3) PARTIAL CIRCULARITY BREAK ONLY -- the LLM's label is a genuinely different function from the kernel verifier's string-equality, so the d-qa/d-qa-r gold-definition circularity is broken in the letter, but with WEAKER independence than a human judge. (4) LICENSE OF A PASS -- a PASS means exactly: 'an independent, kernel-instance-naive LLM, under blind rendering with a demonstrated working escape, endorses the kernel's record content at the pre-declared bar on the 360 d-qa-t items'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0022). It does NOT adjudicate H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC, does NOT substitute for f2b-transfer Stage-1, does NOT license f2b-transfer Stage-2 GPU cells or promotion of any f2b claim, and does NOT extend to human judges, public-benchmark surfaces, other corpora, other rungs, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (5) ASYMMETRIC READING -- the named channels plausibly push A_1p UP (direction unproven, ASM-0021), so FAIL is the more informative outcome: a FAIL warrants the same programme response as f2b-transfer's kill (d) -- pause the verifier-content line and escalate to the maintainer -- while remaining formally scoped to this proxy id; a PASS licenses only continued investment (human judge-1 recruitment, Stage-2 harness build-out) and never upgrades any claim. (6) Item bytes, blind rendering, and the S1-S7 judging standards are byte-identical to f2b-transfer's; nothing else carries over.
hypotheses: H-PROXY-ENDORSE (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol), shown ONLY the blind item rendering under the frozen S1-S7 standards with a mandatory escape, endorses the kernel's record content: one-sided 95% Wilson lower bound of A_1p >= 0.70 over the 360 d-qa-t items. A PASS is a WEAK FEASIBILITY SIGNAL only (envelope clause 4); a FAIL is the kill-(d) analog at this proxy id

H-PROXY-STYLE (instrument alternative, controlled): a high A_1p could be style/familiarity endorsement of NSM-shaped text rather than content endorsement; the deranged-gloss probe (own-gloss deranged out; content-competent judges must answer NONE) bounds the crude form -- false-endorsement point-rate >= 0.30 invalidates the instrument, never reads as a hypothesis outcome

H-FAMILY-CORR (disclosed, measured-as-diagnostic, never verdict-bearing in its pass direction): GPT-5.6 and GPT-5.5 judgments correlate as one model family; raw agreement is reported as the correlation diagnostic; only its FAIL direction (< 0.80, instrument instability) gates
kill_criterion_verbatim: f2b-transfer-llmproxy kill (STAGE-1-ONLY, zero GPU, judge-1 role filled by the pinned GPT-5.6 STAND-IN): FAIL fires iff the one-sided 95% Wilson lower bound of A_1p < 0.70, where A_1p = n_agree_j1p / n_labelled_j1p over the 360 blind d-qa-t items, computed from judge-1p's labels ALONE (GPT-5.6-Sol, pinned invocation data/d-adj-t-llmproxy/judge-1p-invocation.md); agreement = judge-1p label equals membership gold; escape tokens (NONE / 'cannot say') count as DISAGREEMENT; no-label items leave the denominator (instrument events, capped by gate). This mirrors f2b-transfer kill (d) in FORM ONLY; it can neither fire nor discharge f2b-transfer's own kill (d), whose judge-1 is a kernel-naive HUMAN. Degeneracy discipline (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS): preflight failure; n_labelled_j1p < 300 of 360; n_nolabel_j1p > 18 (5%); raw judge-1p/judge-2 agreement < 0.80 over both-labelled items (single-family stability check -- only its FAIL direction is informative; its pass direction validates nothing, judges being one model family); deranged-probe false-endorsement point-rate >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 54/60 (every probe item's own-gloss is deranged out by a seed-pinned Sattolo cycle, so a content-competent judge must answer NONE; a judge endorsing wrong glosses at >= 0.30 is answering from style/familiarity, and its endorsement of the real items cannot be read as content endorsement -- exactly the channel that would fabricate a proxy-PASS under H-CIRC).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions._note: no host models: zero GPU cells in this record
model_revisions.judge-1p: gpt-5.6-sol via @openai/codex 0.144.1 (npx version-pinned; catalog-verified 2026-07-09: efforts low/medium/high/xhigh/max/ultra, default low; pinned effort low)
model_revisions.judge-2: gpt-5.5 via codex-cli 0.142.5 (the f2b-transfer judge-2 instrument, reused read-only as diagnostic)

runner_constraints.authorization: maintainer-requested stand-in (2026-07-09): GPT-5.6 as a judge-1 stand-in to unblock a fast feasibility read while the human judge-1 is unavailable; the formal ack line is posted to the coordination issue at freeze time (design note S5 step 2). Designed by the Fable designer role with design-vs-judge separation (the judged model contributed nothing to this protocol). usd_cap 10 sits far inside every auto-authorization envelope; budget.maintainer_signoff is reserved for Tier-5 records and deliberately absent here
runner_constraints.harness: data/d-adj-t-llmproxy/judge-1p-invocation.md (mechanical; any undecided situation is a BOUNDARY STOP back to Fable, never runner improvisation)
runner_constraints.infra: sequential per-item codex exec calls, concurrency 1; the GLOBAL codex-cli 0.142.5 must NOT be upgraded until the in-flight f2b-transfer judge-2 run completes

title: f2b-transfer-llmproxy -- STAND-IN Stage-1 feasibility read: a pinned cross-vendor LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol) fills the judge-1 role of the f2b-transfer section-4 adjudication protocol because the required kernel-naive HUMAN judge-1 is unavailable; sole-LLM-judge endorsement gold (A_1p from judge-1p alone), the in-flight GPT-5.5 judge-2 demoted to a correlated single-family diagnostic + stability gate (never gold), a deranged-gloss probe as the judge-level content-scramble control (escape-function check), the SAME 360 blind d-qa-t items and S1-S7 standards, zero GPU; the human-judged f2b-transfer remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and solely adjudicating for H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC
